text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital isn't looking well, so I<n>take her to
the infirmary to get some<n>rest.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Please excuse me while I get a little<n>rest. Good
night...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What the... Where am I? Have I been<n>reborn into
another world?!

text_block_list.name: Self A
text_block_list.text:
Close! You haven't been reborn, but<n>copied into
multiple selves instead!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're me! Like an actualreal copy! And there's more of meover there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait, so all these windows floating in<n>mid-air are
showing what the other<n>Digitans are seeing?

text_block_list.name: Self A
text_block_list.text:
That's right. So, what's the first thing<n>we should
do now that we're more<n>than one?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Easy! Go to an Umamusume concert!

text_block_list.name: Self A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... That way, I can see the<n>performers from
multiple angles!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll see the whole venue—from the<n>back to the
front and center, from the<n>left seats to the right!
Long shots, mid<n>shots, medium close-ups! Ohhhhh,
have mercy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I'll have my own individual view<n>from on
stage! First-person<n>multi-angled perspective
concerts are<n>the way of the future!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: My eyes... I have all the eyes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait, what? Was it all just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But the memory of that concert is still<n>fresh in my
mind! Oohoohoo... Time<n>for a replay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital seems to be back in<n>good spirits
and full of energy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's put one of us on training, one<n>reviewing
albums, one perusing my<n>zines, one on
homework, one writing<n>manuscripts, one
organizing merch...<n>If we split everything up, it'll all
be<n>done before you can say Uma!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's see. I'll go to training, and<n>you—

text_block_list.name: Self A
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I wanna go train! Then I'll get to<n>sneak
glances at all the Umas' fresh<n>faces while I work!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay. In that case, I'll switch to<n>writing the
manusc—

text_block_list.name: Self B
text_block_list.text:
Wait! I'm brimming with pathos that I<n>want to put
to the page. Would you let<n>me do it instead?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Agh, why is this so hard to divvy up?!<n>Honestly, I
want to do everything!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh... I guess it was a dream...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I feel like I came<n>face-to-face with my
own greed...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After being toyed with in her own<n>dream, Agnes
Digital fails to recover.
